TypeSignature.Value: .class public auto ansi abstract sealed beforefieldinit SKWebpEncoder extends System.Object

Docs.summary: Provides methods for encoding images and animated image sequences in the WebP format.

MemberSignature.Value: public static SkiaSharp.SKData? Encode (SkiaSharp.SKPixmap src, SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderOptions options);
.method public static hidebysig class SkiaSharp.SKData Encode(class SkiaSharp.SKPixmap src, valuetype SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderOptions options) cil managed

Docs.param: The encoding options controlling quality and compression.
Docs.summary: Encodes the specified pixmap to a WebP-formatted using the given options.
Docs.returns: An containing the WebP-encoded image, or if encoding failed.

MemberSignature.Value: public static bool Encode (SkiaSharp.SKWStream dst, SkiaSharp.SKPixmap src, SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderOptions options);
.method public static hidebysig bool Encode(class SkiaSharp.SKWStream dst, class SkiaSharp.SKPixmap src, valuetype SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderOptions options) cil managed

Docs.param: The destination stream that receives the encoded WebP data.
The encoding options controlling quality and compression.
Docs.summary: Encodes the specified pixmap to WebP and writes the result to a .
Docs.returns: if the image was encoded and written successfully; otherwise, .

MemberSignature.Value: public static bool Encode (System.IO.Stream dst, SkiaSharp.SKPixmap src, SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderOptions options);
.method public static hidebysig bool Encode(class System.IO.Stream dst, class SkiaSharp.SKPixmap src, valuetype SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderOptions options) cil managed

Docs.param: The destination stream that receives the encoded WebP data.
The encoding options controlling quality and compression.
Docs.summary: Encodes the specified pixmap to WebP and writes the result to a .
Docs.returns: if the image was encoded and written successfully; otherwise, .

MemberSignature.Value: public static SkiaSharp.SKData? EncodeAnimated (ReadOnlySpan<SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderFrame> frames, SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderOptions options);

.method public static hidebysig class SkiaSharp.SKData EncodeAnimated(valuetype System.ReadOnlySpan`1<valuetype SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderFrame> frames, valuetype SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderOptions options) cil managed

Docs.param: The sequence of frames to encode, each with an image and a display duration.
The encoding options controlling quality and compression.
Docs.summary: Encodes a sequence of frames into an animated WebP using the given options.
Docs.returns: An containing the animated WebP data, or if encoding failed.

MemberSignature.Value: public static bool EncodeAnimated (SkiaSharp.SKWStream dst, ReadOnlySpan<SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderFrame> frames, SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderOptions options);

.method public static hidebysig bool EncodeAnimated(class SkiaSharp.SKWStream dst, valuetype System.ReadOnlySpan`1<valuetype SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderFrame> frames, valuetype SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderOptions options) cil managed

Docs.param: The destination stream that receives the encoded animated WebP data.
The sequence of frames to encode.
The encoding options controlling quality and compression.
Docs.summary: Encodes a sequence of frames into an animated WebP and writes the result to a .
Docs.returns: if the animated image was encoded and written successfully; otherwise, .

MemberSignature.Value: public static bool EncodeAnimated (System.IO.Stream dst, ReadOnlySpan<SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderFrame> frames, SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderOptions options);

.method public static hidebysig bool EncodeAnimated(class System.IO.Stream dst, valuetype System.ReadOnlySpan`1<valuetype SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderFrame> frames, valuetype SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderOptions options) cil managed

The encoding options controlling quality and compression.
